behaviors.description: The content passed to the summary-generation step includes data retrieved from all three sources.
behaviors.justification: Failure boundary is module handoff: source collectors -> aggregation layer -> summary input payload. A unit test of one mapper can miss wiring bugs where one source is dropped. Integration is sufficient because this behavior does not require real network/OS/subprocess, does not depend on model output quality, and does not chain agentic steps. Rejected higher levels: behavior text is about input assembly ('content passed to the summary-generation step'), not real infra behavior or LLM judgment.
behaviors.test_description: Wire the three source adapters with in-process fakes returning distinct sentinel data, run report assembly, and assert the exact payload sent into summary generation contains all three sections/fields.

behaviors.description: When one data source is unavailable, the report is produced with a `data unavailable` note for that section rather than aborting.
behaviors.justification: Failure appears at cross-module error propagation and fallback rendering (source client error -> orchestrator -> report section note). Unit is too low because single-function logic can pass while inter-module exception handling fails. Integration-brake checks: no required real OS/network/subprocess for minimum reproduction; no dependence on AI output; no multi-agent sequence.
behaviors.test_description: Run the report pipeline with two fake sources returning data and one fake source raising timeout/unavailable error; verify output report is still produced and includes `data unavailable` only for the failed section.

behaviors.description: The narrative summary accurately represents the key values present in the input data.
behaviors.justification: This is output-quality correctness of narrative generation, not just plumbing. A deterministic stub would always pass and hide real omissions/hallucinations in model-generated text. Rejected Integration: behavior text requires semantic faithfulness ('accurately represents key values'), which depends on real model behavior if summary generation is AI-based. Rejected Workflow: this behavior targets a single generation decision, not multiple agentic stages.
behaviors.test_description: Use fixed input datasets with known key values, call the real summary-generation model/service, and evaluate whether generated narrative preserves required facts/figures within acceptance criteria across repeated runs.
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: If implementation is purely deterministic templating (no AI/ML), this would demote to Integration.

behaviors.description: A complete report — from data collection through email delivery — reaches the configured recipient's inbox correctly.
behaviors.justification: Minimum failure boundary includes real external interfaces: actual source HTTP/API calls plus real email delivery path/inbox receipt. Mocks can hide auth, transport, formatting, and deliverability failures. Rejected Agentic: behavior text validates delivery completion ('reaches inbox correctly'), not model decision quality; it can be asserted without judging LLM output content. Rejected Workflow: no required multi-agent decision chain is specified.
behaviors.test_description: Execute the scheduled/report run against real staging data endpoints and real email transport to a test mailbox; assert one full report message is received by configured recipient with expected subject/body envelope.

behaviors.description: When the email delivery service is unreachable, the generated report is saved to a local file and delivery is retried on the next scheduled run.
behaviors.justification: Failure boundary spans real infra conditions: unreachable email service, durable filesystem fallback, and cross-run retry behavior tied to scheduler/runtime environment. In-process mocks can miss real connection failures and persistence/retry timing issues. Rejected Integration: behavior explicitly references service reachability and next scheduled run, which are infrastructure-level conditions.
behaviors.test_description: Run once with email endpoint intentionally unreachable (real connection failure), verify report is persisted to fallback file; trigger the next scheduled run with email restored and verify previously saved report is retried and delivered, then cleared/marked sent.
